description: Not a single-GPT infographic — a meta-dashboard listing every Custom GPT the user owns, each as an independently live-pinged card that deep-links to the real GPT and links out to that GPT's own dedicated app.html (built separately, one per GPT, via the normal Six-Stage Pipeline). Does not attempt to force every GPT's distinct input/output contract into one shared schema — RNAi Precision Crop Designer OS has a completely different contract (dsRNA design, off-target screening, vault endpoints) than Vector Trial Governance Navigator's /run+/chat, and forcing them into one generic form would misrepresent both.

gpts.name: Vector Trial Governance Navigator
gpts.note: Fully wired this session: local backend + shared-secret auth + cloudflared tunnel, tested end-to-end.

gpts.name: RNAi Precision Crop Designer OS
gpts.note: Confirmed live and reachable (HTTP 200) via curl during this build. Real Render-hosted backend with its own distinct API contract (/design/dsrna, /screen/offtarget, /simulate, /vault/*).

gpts.name: ACI-GPT
gpts.note: Mentioned in project history but no confirmed live backend or chat URL found in this workspace — placeholder card only, shown disabled until connected.

gpts.name: ForensicAI GPT
gpts.note: Two HF Spaces referenced in project history (forensic-analysis-api, forensic-brain) but no confirmed live URL found in this workspace — placeholder card only, shown disabled until connected.

theme_hint: meta/directory palette — distinct from any individual GPT's domain theme (not civic-editorial, not wet-lab cyan/red) since this page's job is to be an index, not a science-comm piece. Clean slate/graphite with one accent color.
